sections.instruction: For Questions 1-6, write A if she says YES, DEFINITELY; B if she says MAYBE; C if she says DEFINITELY NOT. For Questions 7-10, choose the correct letter A-C.

questions.content: How does the owner answer? Write A if she says YES, DEFINITELY; B if she says MAYBE; C if she says DEFINITELY NOT.

C if she says DEFINITELY NOT
